# Copilot instructions

## Mandatory pre-work checklist

- Before analysis, planning, or edits, read `/tmp/workspace/Guebbit/boilerplate-vue-frontend/AI_README.md`.
- Treat `/tmp/workspace/Guebbit/boilerplate-vue-frontend/AI_README.md` as required repository policy and follow it during the whole task.

- For every change, check whether documentation must be updated.
